growth.narrative: 19% weighted premium rerates. 3 states flipped charters (MO, CO, KS). Delayed commission reduction to 5/1.
$2M in YTD savings on Integrity marketing allowance. $1.2M on MS incentive savings. $270K in GHN savings. 49% UW mix YTD. 8.9% rolling 12-month lapse through 3/31.
20% increase in ancillary health sales in Q1 2026 vs Q1 2025.
Annual plan in process. Quality score not yet implemented. No agents terminated. Minor service improvements to date.
ME% 2025: 44.7% vs 2026: 50.4%. MP% level to prior year. Avg face slightly up.

digital.narrative: On Track — 35% migrated into Data Lakehouse.
Score: 95 (target >90). Strong data quality achieved.
On Track — 17% of reports migrated to Lakehouse.
On Track — 50% user engagement rate, above goal.
On Track — 1 AI use case in pipeline. Intake and use cases on target.
On Track — 9% increase. 2026 health lack-of-production automation driving the increase. Targeting health state management and health econtracting changes.

1% increase. Health below 2025 levels due to GI/SEP volumes and slight increase in underwritten cases not going STP. Preneed trending up due to stoppage of paper apps in Nov 2025. GI/SEP Med Sup automation efforts in progress.
On Track — 8% increase. Seeing benefits of one-time credit card automation completed at end of 2025. 2026 Preneed grace period management driving up automation.
On Track — 4% increase. Higher IVA usage but no major containment changes. Claims status experience improved. Further opportunities under evaluation.
On Track — 0.1% increase. Research underway on future opportunities in Med Sup and ancillary products. Target: auto-adjudicate 6K additional applications/quarter.
On Track. Agent Admin kaizen event planned for May 2026. Critical items from previous Kaizens incorporated into 2026 goals.
On Track. Enterprise architecture view in progress. Architectural standards under review for ARB. Architecture incorporated into PACT process.
On Track. AI next steps in progress. 1st round of AI intake scheduled for June 2026. AI & Automation CoE for Operations efficiencies underway.
On Track. 333/374 employees actively using Copilot with 20,000 prompts in last 30 days. Collaborating with HR on AI education and change management.

digital.objective: Speed to Market — Product Rollout Optimization
digital.narrative: On Track. TMO process improvement in progress. Started evaluation of long-term solution.
On Track. MVP launch is on track for late June 2026.
Exercise will begin in May 2026. High-value changes to be identified.
Message Center project on track for July/August delivery. Text short code has reached approval. Conversion Reporting in progress.
CE Data Science working with Ent Data to ingest Sentiment, ahead of schedule. CSAT work kicks off in July.

digital.objective: Remove Friction — Payment, Claims, Onboarding Journeys
digital.narrative: Payment journeys on track to deliver by end of Q2. Claims journey on HI begun and on track for Q3.
Churn modeling begun. Will deliver by end of Q2 with journeys beginning in Q3.
Portal project kicked off. Requirements gathered and work begun.
All ELT roles have a ready-soon internal successor. BOD awareness and plan for CEO succession in place.
Demonstrated by dedicated resources and workspace for Agent Portal. Improved movement on PaaP and collaboration of AI strategy.

capital.narrative: MVP framework developed and utilized for 26R2 plan. Refinements expected prior to 27R1.

capital.objective: YE RBC Estimate Within 3% of Actuals
capital.narrative: Pre-covariance RBC calculation within tolerance. Charge by charge ties out well (~2bps off). Slippage in Covariance assumption due to entity-level actual calculations vs. rolled-up modeling calculation.
On track. Significant capital scenario modeling completed in Q1. To be shared with CapCo.
On track. Progress made on liquidity/cash flow model. Appropriate resources assigned. Continue to test and iterate.
Working several tracks: surplus note, FE block reinsurance, structured reinsurance with Canada Life, Gen Re coinsurance. Nothing close to execution yet. RBC drops below 350% at expected sales levels.
Playbook established but does not yet outline which opportunities are preferable under varying circumstances. Further work needed.

learningAndDecisions.description: Describe the strategic decision made, the alternatives considered, and the rationale.

learningAndDecisions.description: Describe what assumption changed, why it changed, and how the strategy should adapt.
